questionHtml: Predict, with a reason, whether isotactic or atactic polypropene has the higher melting point.
markschemeHtml:
isotactic «has higher melting point» AND ordered chains pack more closely
OR
isotactic «has higher melting point» AND stronger intermolecular/London/dispersion forces ✔

NOTE: Accept “van der Waals’ forces”/”vdW”.

meta.title: Predict, with a reason, whether isotactic or atactic polypropene has the higher melting point.
